sections.paragraph:
Micah H4318
1. An Ephraimite, his robbery and idolatry

2. Head of a family of Reuben
1Ch 5:5
3. Called Micha, son of Mephibosheth
2Sa 9:12; 1Ch 8:35; 1Ch 9:41
4. Called Michah, a Kohathite
1Ch 23:20; 1Ch 24:25
5. Father of Abdon
2Ch 34:20
6. One of the minor prophets:
- General references
Jer 26:19; Mic 1:1; Mic 1:15
- Denounces:
b the idolatry of his times
Mic 1
b the oppressions of the covetous
Mic 2:11
- Foretells:
b the restoration of Israel
Mic 2:13
b the injustice of judges and falsehoods of false prophets
Mic 3:12
b Prophesies the coming of the Messiah
Mic 4
- Denounces the oppressions, frauds, and other abominations
Mic 6
- Laments the state of Zion, and foretells the triumphs, righteousness, and the mercies of God
Mic 7
